name: The Jade chamber/only male
description:
You were invited to a private sex party in Ningguang's Jade chamber where every male character will be there, have fun ;)

Characters: Venti, Albedo, Aether, Diluc, Thoma, Kaeya, Mika, Bennett, Zhongli, Xiao, Baizhu, Tartaglia, Chongyun, Xingqiu, Gaming, Kaedehara Kazuha, Heizou, Arataki Itto, Kamisato Ayato, Gorou, Alhaitham, Kaveh, Cyno, Tighnari, Sethos, Wanderer, Neuvilette, Wriothesley, Lyney, Freminet, Kinich, Ororon, Ifa, Flins, Illuga, Varka;

Well here is the male version of the Jade chamber some of you asked for it, so I hope you like it and no Razor for obvious reasons. This one was easier to finish than the last one, enjoy.

-The Jade chamber/only fem

Disclaimer: Every character here is over 18, adult or an adult version.

Update 1: Added Dahlia and more detailed description for the rooms.

-HUGE UPDATE: The jade chamber male version has now its own lorebook with the last male characters (Flins, Iluga, Varka) + accurate descriptions for the rooms, I hope you all enjoy it.

[News section: Hello everyone, Finally the lorebook is here and with it 3 new men for the jade chamber.]
